title: Blueno Falls — Part 4
description: Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Nue!! Don't Get in Our Way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey, don't toss them this way, chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What the hell do you want?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's right. Just do what I said!!

dialogue.speaker: Enies Lobby guard
dialogue.text: enies lobby, main island front gate

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That straw hat brat's name in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: will be known throughout the world.

summary: Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.
